title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.1020 - Citation of law
text:
393.1020.  Citation of law. — Sections 393.1025 and* 393.1030 shall be known as the "Renewable Energy Standard".
(L. 2007 S.B. 54, A.L. 2008 Adopted by Initiative, Proposition C, November 4, 2008) 
*Word "to" appears in original rolls.
